messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to provide you with a quick update on the backend migration project.

The migration is currently 80% complete and we are on track for Friday delivery. The team is making good progress and we expect to have everything finalized by the end of the week.

Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns.

Best regards

content.delta: Perfect! I've sent the email to alice@example.com with the subject "Project Update" summarizing that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery. The email has been successfully sent.
